request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that extremists exploit. The 2024 London attacks proved we need expanded domestic surveillance powers. Critics claim this threatens civil liberties, but in reality, targeted monitoring of high-risk individuals (with proper oversight) is our best deterrent. The alternative? More preventable tragedies. #NationalSecurityFirst
